name: get_related_concepts
description: Explore the knowledge base at a high level: browse the wiki index, generate a Map of Content for a topic, find hot concepts, get exploration suggestions, view query trends, or identify knowledge gaps. Use this for big-picture understanding and discovery.

action.description: 'wiki_index' — full entity index by type; 'moc' — Map of Content for a topic; 'hot' — most active concepts; 'suggestions' — exploration topic recommendations; 'trends' — recent query trends; 'gaps' — topics frequently queried but lacking content.

topic.description: Topic name for 'moc' action. Required when action is 'moc'.

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return. Default 10.

days.description: Lookback window in days for 'trends' action. Default 30.
